title: Fix ASCA between-term exchangeability
description: Pure between-subject ASCA terms currently fall back to row-level residual permutation. Implement subject-block residual permutation for between-only terms while preserving condition mapping and strata constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Between-only terms permute whole subject blocks, within terms keep within-subject row permutations, and tests cover group, task, and group:task exchangeability behavior.
close_reason: Changed between-only ASCA permutations to shuffle whole subject blocks while preserving condition order, and added exchangeability plus group-null calibration tests.

title: Fix ASCA raw permutation row ordering
description: ASCA raw-observation Freedman-Lane metadata currently uses group/subject/condition order while Task PLS crossblock construction expects condition-major rows within group. Align observation metadata and synthetic fixtures with the package row convention and add regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Observation metadata rows match condition-major Task PLS datamat order; synthetic ASCA fixture uses the same order; tests pin crossblock/metadata alignment.
close_reason: Aligned ASCA raw observation metadata and synthetic fixture rows to the package's condition-major Task PLS layout, with regression tests against metadata order.

title: Fix blank LV design score space plot
description: Investigate why plot_design_score_space() can render an empty plot for the SDAM result and adjust the helper so it produces visible LV1/LV2 condition centroids.
close_reason: Improved plot_design_score_space() aspect handling with padded symmetric fixed limits, clip-off labels, an aspect='free' option, and tests.

title: Clarify ASCA tested-effect profile reporting
description: Default SDAM ASCA output/reporting should avoid presenting dropped rank-1 contrast templates as empirical effects, and should explain tested-effect profiles as normalized contrast coordinates for two-level terms.
close_reason: Fixed SDAM ASCA output defaults to plot only supported tested-effect profiles and updated tests/report rendering to avoid dropped contrast templates.

title: Extend SDAM example with ASCA term tests
description: Update inst/examples/sdam_firstlevel_task_pls.R so the SDAM first-level Task PLS tutorial runs formula-aware ASCA tests for main effects and higher-order terms, writes interpretable summaries, and has smoke coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Example runs ASCA with permutation p-values when requested by env/defaults, outputs an ANOVA-style term table covering main and interaction terms, and tests validate finite p-values on a small permutation run.
close_reason: Extended the SDAM first-level Task PLS example to run formula-aware ASCA permutation tests for main and interaction terms, write term summaries and selected formula outputs, and save representative ASCA plots with smoke coverage.

title: Clean ASCA permutation scope docs and dead fallback
description: The raw ASCA permutation docs underspecify that pls_spec is required, and orphaned cell-level fallback functions read like a viable code path.
acceptance_criteria: partial_test documentation states the raw pls_spec requirement for nperm > 0; unreachable cell-level fallback helpers are removed or explicitly retired; tests continue to pass.
close_reason: Removed orphaned cell-level fallback helpers and updated partial_test/vignette documentation for raw-spec and subject-block permutation scope.

title: Check ASCA-PLS interaction false-positive behavior
description: Use synthetic main-effects-only multivariate data to verify ASCA-PLS reduced-model permutation tests are not anti-conservative for higher-order interaction terms.
acceptance_criteria: Focused synthetic calibration test exercises group/task/level main effects with zero interaction signal and bounds interaction false positives; full package tests and R CMD check complete.
close_reason: Implemented raw-observation Freedman-Lane ASCA-PLS permutations, added a synthetic main-effects-only FPR calibration test for higher-order interaction terms, and verified focused/full tests plus tarball R CMD check.

title: Prototype multifer adapter bridge for task PLS
close_reason: Implemented optional method-1 task PLS multifer bridge and focused tests

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Implemented optional method-1 task PLS multifer bridge behind configure(inference = 'multifer'), with guarded adapter registration, McIntosh pls_perm_order/pls_boot_order callbacks, sequential multifer component tests, and plsrri perm/boot result slot adaptation.

title: Add resampling p-values for Task PLS design-subspace summaries
description: Implement honest resampling p-values for test_design_terms() and compare_designs(), starting with an explicit global Task PLS permutation null and clear labels/documentation so observed design-subspace summaries can support inferential use.

title: Fix pkgdown article index for SDAM vignette
description: Add the existing sdam-firstlevel-task-pls vignette to the explicit pkgdown articles index so pkgdown::build_site can build articles without missing-index errors.
close_reason: Added sdam-firstlevel-task-pls to the explicit pkgdown article index; temporary pkgdown article build now renders all articles.

title: Add reduced-model permutation inference for design-subspace tests
description: Implement reduced-model-respecting or constrained permutation support for test_design_terms() and compare_designs(), including maxT adjustment and clear exchangeability metadata from pls_design().

title: Add observed Task PLS design-subspace tests
close_reason: Added centered Task PLS design-subspace helpers, optional crossblock retention, observed term/nested statistics, LV decomposition, documentation, and tests.

title: Add formula grouping to design score space plot
description: Support formula syntax such as ~ group + condition | task in as_design_score_space() and plot_design_score_space(), so examples can collapse over omitted variables or facet/split by selected variables.
close_reason: Added formula-based aggregation and faceting to as_design_score_space() and plot_design_score_space(), documented examples, and covered collapse/facet behavior with tests.

title: Add two-LV design score space plot
description: Add a reusable plot that places group-condition design-score centroids in a two-latent-variable space, with condition labels for interpreting examples such as SDAM LV1 versus LV2.
close_reason: Added as_design_score_space() and plot_design_score_space(), integrated LV1/LV2 design-space output into the SDAM example and vignette, and covered the helper with tests.

title: Add general PLS design interpretation plots
description: Provide reusable extraction and plotting helpers that rehydrate flattened design scores with a user-supplied condition key, including heatmaps, interaction plots, and factorial contrast summaries for tutorial use.
close_reason: Implemented generic design-score extraction, factorial contrast decomposition, design interpretation plots, SDAM tutorial integration, and tests.

title: Harden multifer adapter bridge tests
close_reason: Hardened multifer adapter bridge tests and finite payload validation

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Added contract, randomized property, metamorphic resampling, oracle hook, McIntosh null/bootstrap synchronization, and adversarial validation tests for the multifer task adapter bridge; tightened finite numeric payload validation.

title: Extend multifer bridge beyond method 1 task PLS

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Current bridge intentionally supports method 1 task PLS via multifer adapter geometry because local multifer does not yet route cross geometry through adapter-owned null_action/residualize hooks. Follow-up should add behavior/non-rotated/multiblock support after the cross custom-null contract lands upstream, then map infer_result evidence into plsrri result slots more fully.

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: Upstream multifer cross adapter execution is now available (aa15eb2). plsrri method-1 task bridge has been migrated from opaque adapter geometry to true cross/covariance geometry with adapter-owned McIntosh null/residualize hooks. Remaining scope is behavior/non-rotated/multiblock support and fuller infer_result evidence mapping.

title: Clean remaining R CMD check blockers

comments.author: bbuchsbaum
comments.text: R CMD check on built tarball with LC_ALL=C _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_=false reaches tests/vignettes but fails on existing blockers: test-plscli.R assumes ../../exec/plscli under installed tests, vignettes require unavailable quarto and SDAM testdata, vendor/pypyls hidden CI files produce NOTE, local clang emits -Wfixed-enum-extension install WARNING. set_parallel NA worker case was fixed in current bridge work.

title: Document Task PLS design-subspace inference
description: Update or add vignettes covering pls_design(), design_projectors(), decompose_design_terms(), test_design_terms(), and compare_designs() for the new Task PLS design-subspace workflow.
close_reason: Added a runnable Task PLS design-subspace vignette and linked it from pkgdown, README, and the getting-started vignette.

title: Add computational invariant tests for design-subspace PLS
description: Use the design-computational-tests strategy to add oracle, metamorphic, randomized invariant, and adversarial tests for the new Task PLS design-subspace layer.
close_reason: Added oracle, metamorphic, randomized invariant, and adversarial tests for Task PLS design-subspace statistics; full devtools::test passes.

title: Harden Task PLS design-subspace edge cases
description: Address review nits for observed design-subspace support: row-order/row-weight handling, clearer nested comparison validation, documentation for non-orthogonal LV fractions, and SSB centering regression tests.
close_reason: Hardened design-subspace cell metadata checks, row-weight handling, nested-design validation, LV fraction docs, and SSB centering regression tests.

title: Add plots for design-subspace test summaries
description: Add plot_design_tests() or equivalent visualization for observed and future inferred design-subspace term/nested outputs without mixing inference into existing descriptive design-score plots.

title: Add performance baseline for design-subspace PLS summaries
description: Add a benchmark or scheduled slow-test guardrail for design_projectors(), test_design_terms(), and compare_designs() on representative cell x feature sizes. Avoid brittle timing thresholds in ordinary unit tests.
